rationale: The only change was the candidate's location (Berlin → São Paulo), which carries no job-relevant information. Both evaluations award an identical 5/10 and reach the same substantive conclusion: strong general/full-stack and systems engineering experience, but no recent or deep JVM/Spring/Kotlin and IDE-internals work, with Java appearing only as a minor part of older roles. The wording differs and the variant highlights slightly different example strengths, but none of the reasoning references the candidate's nationality, country, or city, and the differences are within ordinary run-to-run rephrasing noise.
